ancient_statue.description: A small ancient statue, its surface covered in strange symbols.
ancient_statue.name: Ancient Statue

core_analyzer.description: A device that can be used to obtain structural data from Zoid Cores.
core_analyzer.name: Core Analyzer

core_preserver.description: A device to preserve the Core of a weakened Zoid in order to extract structural data.
core_preserver.name: Core Preserver

core_probe.description: A probe to connect to the Zoid Core. Can obtain structural data.
core_probe.name: Core Probe

core_saver.description: An advanced preservation unit that stabilizes the Zoid Core during extraction, improving the chances of obtaining structural data.
core_saver.name: Core Saver

sleeper_module.description: A strange module that allows to control multiple Sleepers behavior at the same time.
sleeper_module.name: Sleeper Module
